arts.sum: Real Madrid host Celta Vigo in a single-elimination Copa del Rey game. Coach Ancelotti will not be expected to make many rotations, which means that Real Madrid should take this game very seriously knowing that the crowd at the Santiago Bernabeu will be monitoring the team’s performance very closely.
